requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — EAEU TR CU / EAC Certification and IEC 62619 as Compliance Gates for Armenia BESS
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——EAEU TR CU / EAC认证和IEC 62619作为亚美尼亚BESS合规门槛
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——EAEU TR CU / EAC認證和IEC 62619作為亞美尼亞BESS合規門檻

summary.en: Armenia is a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU), which means EAEU Technical Regulations (TR CU / TR EAEU) and the EAC (Eurasian Conformity) mark are mandatory for in-scope products placed on the Armenian market. This is a critical difference from non-EAEU markets: the EAC certification route is a genuine mandatory pathway for Chinese BESS exporters to Armenia — not an optional add-on. The primary EAEU Technical Regulations applicable to BESS equipment are TR CU 004/2011 (On the Safety of Low-Voltage Equipment) and TR CU 020/2011 (Electromagnetic Compatibility of Technical Products). EAC certification must be obtained from an EAEU-accredited certification body (not a Chinese certification body); Chinese GB certifications and CCC marks are not accepted as equivalent. SARM (National Body of Standards and Metrology of Armenia) is Armenia's national standards body within the EAEU framework. SARM may adopt IEC standards nationally — including IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) and IEC 62133 — as the technical basis for BESS cell and module safety assessments alongside or within EAEU TR requirements. IEC 62619 is also the internationally expected safety standard referenced in project specifications for utility-scale and C&I BESS projects. Exporters must verify: (a) which EAEU TR CU apply to their specific BESS product configuration; (b) whether SARM has adopted IEC 62619 as an Armenian national standard; and (c) any additional product registration, customs union import permit, or PSRC/ENA technical acceptance requirements.
summary.zh: 亚美尼亚是欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员国，这意味着EAEU技术法规（TR CU / TR EAEU）和EAC（欧亚合格）标志对在亚美尼亚市场销售的范围内产品是强制要求。这与非EAEU市场有重要区别：EAC认证路径是中国BESS出口商进入亚美尼亚市场的真实强制途径——不是可选附加项。适用于BESS设备的主要EAEU技术法规是TR CU 004/2011（低压设备安全）和TR CU 020/2011（技术产品电磁兼容性）。EAC认证须由EAEU认可认证机构（而非中国认证机构）颁发；中国GB认证和CCC标志不被接受为等效依据。SARM（亚美尼亚国家标准和计量委员会）是亚美尼亚在EAEU框架内的国家标准机构。SARM可在国家层面采纳IEC标准——包括IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）和IEC 62133——作为BESS电芯和模组安全评估的技术依据，与EAEU TR要求并行或纳入其中。IEC 62619也是公用事业规模和工商业BESS项目规格中引用的国际预期安全标准。出口商须核实：（a）哪些EAEU TR CU适用于其具体BESS产品配置；（b）SARM是否已将IEC 62619采纳为亚美尼亚国家标准；（c）任何额外的产品注册、关税同盟进口许可或PSRC/ENA技术验收要求。
summary.zht: 亞美尼亞是歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員國，這意味著EAEU技術法規（TR CU / TR EAEU）和EAC（歐亞合格）標誌對在亞美尼亞市場銷售的範圍內產品是強制要求。這與非EAEU市場有重要區別：EAC認證路徑是中國BESS出口商進入亞美尼亞市場的真實強制途徑——不是可選附加項。適用於BESS設備的主要EAEU技術法規是TR CU 004/2011（低壓設備安全）和TR CU 020/2011（技術產品電磁相容性）。EAC認證須由EAEU認可認證機構（而非中國認證機構）頒發；中國GB認證和CCC標誌不被接受為等效依據。SARM（亞美尼亞國家標準和計量委員會）是亞美尼亞在EAEU框架內的國家標準機構。SARM可在國家層面採納IEC標準——包括IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）和IEC 62133——作為BESS電芯和模組安全評估的技術依據，與EAEU TR要求並行或納入其中。IEC 62619也是公用事業規模和工商業BESS項目規格中引用的國際預期安全標準。出口商須核實：（a）哪些EAEU TR CU適用於其具體BESS產品配置；（b）SARM是否已將IEC 62619採納為亞美尼亞國家標準；（c）任何額外的產品注冊、關稅同盟進口許可或PSRC/ENA技術驗收要求。

standards_or_laws: EAEU TR CU 004/2011 — On the Safety of Low-Voltage Equipment (mandatory EAC certification required for in-scope BESS equipment; Chinese GB/CCC not accepted as equivalent)
EAEU TR CU 020/2011 — Electromagnetic Compatibility of Technical Products (mandatory EAC certification required for in-scope BESS equipment)

IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in project specifications; may be adopted by SARM as Armenian national standard — verify with sarm.am)
IEC 62133 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries (may be relevant for module-level assessment; verify SARM adoption status)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard; may be referenced in project specifications)
SARM — National Body of Standards and Metrology of Armenia (verify current adopted national standards for BESS at sarm.am)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. Chinese CCC (China Compulsory Certification) applies to certain battery product categories domestically. These Chinese standards and CCC marks are not accepted as equivalents to EAEU TR CU / EAC requirements in Armenia. Exporters must obtain EAC certification from an EAEU-accredited certification body for in-scope BESS equipment, in addition to any IEC 62619 evidence required by project specifications.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。中国CCC（强制性产品认证）在国内适用于某些电池产品类别。上述中国标准和CCC标志不被亚美尼亚接受为EAEU TR CU / EAC要求的等效依据。出口商除项目规格要求的IEC 62619证据外，还须由EAEU认可认证机构颁发范围内BESS设备的EAC证书。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。中國CCC（強制性產品認證）在國內適用於某些電池產品類別。上述中國標準和CCC標誌不被亞美尼亞接受為EAEU TR CU / EAC要求的等效依據。出口商除項目規格要求的IEC 62619證據外，還須由EAEU認可認證機構頒發範圍內BESS設備的EAC證書。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap (dual): (1) EAEU EAC certification gap — Armenia is an EAEU member and TR CU 004/2011 (LVD) and TR CU 020/2011 (EMC) are mandatory for in-scope BESS equipment. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and CCC marks are not accepted as substitutes for EAC certification. Exporters must engage an EAEU-accredited certification body to determine which TR CU apply to their product configuration and to obtain EAC certification before market placement. (2) IEC 62619 evidence gap — project owners and project specifications for utility-scale and C&I BESS in Armenia are expected to reference IEC 62619 as the technical safety baseline for cells and modules, consistent with international project practice. Chinese GB standards are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) determine EAC certification scope via an EAEU-accredited certification body; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Armenian BESS projects; (c) verify with SARM (sarm.am) whether IEC 62619 or IEC 62133 have been adopted as Armenian national standards; (d) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距（双重）：（1）EAEU EAC认证差距——亚美尼亚是EAEU成员国，TR CU 004/2011（低压设备）和TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）对范围内BESS设备是强制要求。中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和CCC标志不被接受为EAC认证的替代依据。出口商须与EAEU认可认证机构接触，确定哪些TR CU适用于其产品配置，并在产品上市前取得EAC证书。（2）IEC 62619证据差距——亚美尼亚公用事业规模和工商业BESS项目业主和项目规格，预计将IEC 62619作为电芯和模组的技术安全基准，与国际项目惯例一致。中国GB标准未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）通过EAEU认可认证机构确定EAC认证范围；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至亚美尼亚BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）向SARM（sarm.am）核实IEC 62619或IEC 62133是否已作为亚美尼亚国家标准采纳；（d）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格中引用的IEC 62619版本。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距（雙重）：（1）EAEU EAC認證差距——亞美尼亞是EAEU成員國，TR CU 004/2011（低壓設備）和TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）對範圍內BESS設備是強制要求。中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和CCC標誌不被接受為EAC認證的替代依據。出口商須與EAEU認可認證機構接觸，確定哪些TR CU適用於其產品配置，並在產品上市前取得EAC證書。（2）IEC 62619證據差距——亞美尼亞公用事業規模和工商業BESS項目業主和項目規格，預計將IEC 62619作為電芯和模組的技術安全基準，與國際項目慣例一致。中國GB標準未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）通過EAEU認可認證機構確定EAC認證範圍；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至亞美尼亞BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）向SARM（sarm.am）核實IEC 62619或IEC 62133是否已作為亞美尼亞國家標準採納；（d）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格中引用的IEC 62619版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAEU TR CU 004/2011 (LVD) and TR CU 020/2011 (EMC) EAC certification is mandatory for in-scope BESS equipment placed on the Armenian market; IEC 62619 compliance is mandatory in project practice where project specifications require it; verify SARM national standard adoption status
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary; CCC applies to domestic product categories — none are accepted as EAEU EAC equivalents

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Armenia's EAEU membership means EAC certification under TR CU 004/2011 (LVD) and TR CU 020/2011 (EMC) is a mandatory gateway for in-scope BESS equipment — this is a genuine and enforceable requirement that does not apply in non-EAEU markets. Chinese GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, and CCC certifications alone are not sufficient for Armenian market placement. In addition, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in project specifications. Verify EAEU TR CU applicability with an EAEU-accredited certification body, obtain EAC certification for in-scope equipment, confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, and verify SARM's current adopted national standards for BESS (sarm.am) before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 亚美尼亚的EAEU成员国身份意味着，范围内BESS设备须依据TR CU 004/2011（低压设备）和TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）取得EAC认证——这是真实可执行的强制要求，在非EAEU市场不适用。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和CCC认证不足以满足亚美尼亚市场准入要求。此外，IEC 62619是项目规格中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。出货前请向EAEU认可认证机构核实EAEU TR CU适用性，为范围内设备取得EAC证书，向项目业主确认IEC 62619证据要求，并核实SARM现行BESS相关采纳国家标准（sarm.am）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 亞美尼亞的EAEU成員國身份意味著，範圍內BESS設備須依據TR CU 004/2011（低壓設備）和TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）取得EAC認證——這是真實可執行的強制要求，在非EAEU市場不適用。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023和CCC認證不足以滿足亞美尼亞市場准入要求。此外，IEC 62619是項目規格中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。出貨前請向EAEU認可認證機構核實EAEU TR CU適用性，為範圍內設備取得EAC證書，向項目業主確認IEC 62619證據要求，並核實SARM現行BESS相關採納國家標準（sarm.am）。
